title: Vulcan PvP Pack
description: Vulcan is a new generation in the PvP world.
body: A highly optimized PvP pack by TheHatters for Fabric 1.21.11, combining minimalist graphics and performance-focused mods to maximize FPS, reduce lag, and improve combat clarity. Low-fire rate visual effects, small items, and precise model fixes, plus Vulcan, Lithium, lazyDFU [UNOFFICIAL PORT], FerriteCore, and ImmediatelyFast mods ensure smooth and stable gameplay. Designed for serious PvP, crystal battles, and high-intensity combat.![Vulcan PvP Pack by WEzexek1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f843983e5ad455d8d0618f7dade892a02e7bfa1d.png)
